mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (doc_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, char_count, create_time) VALUES
(#{chunk.docId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.embedding}, #{chunk.charCount}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId}

SELECT kc.id as chunk_id, kc.doc_id, kd.doc_name, kc.content, kc.chunk_index FROM knowledge_chunk kc JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kc.doc_id = kd.id WHERE kd.status = 'completed' ORDER BY kc.id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT kc.id as chunk_id, kc.doc_id, kd.doc_name, kc.content, kc.embedding, kc.chunk_index FROM knowledge_chunk kc JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kc.doc_id = kd.id WHERE kd.status = 'completed'

SELECT kc.id as chunk_id, kc.doc_id, kd.doc_name, kc.content, kc.embedding, kc.chunk_index FROM knowledge_chunk kc JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kc.doc_id = kd.id WHERE kd.status = 'completed' AND kd.user_id = #{userId}
